string_relevant_messages.text: I am building an AI system to generate multiple-choice questions from lecture notes but many outputs are shallow.
The questions become repetitive across different note chunks.
I want more analysis and application style questions, not pure recall.
I bought new running shoes and started morning jogging.
I need answer checking with explanations in the same pipeline.
Retrieved context is sometimes irrelevant or too long.
I want the assistant to adapt across subjects and difficulty levels.
My Python CSV processing script gets very slow for large files.
Memory usage spikes and occasionally crashes the process.
I want to profile the code to find the exact bottleneck.
I am learning watercolor painting in my free time.
Chunked processing might help but I need clean implementation.
I am unsure whether pandas is really the main problem.
I am deciding between machine learning and full-stack development.
I enjoy both model building and user-facing app development.
I have projects in both areas but limited depth in each.
I want to know which path has better long-term stability.
I am picking a marathon club for this semester.
I need a plan that keeps options open while building expertise.
My laptop keyboard backlight recently stopped working.
I sleep late because of workload and screen time.
Even when I go to bed early I struggle to fall asleep.
I cannot follow sleep hygiene consistently in college.
I drink caffeine and wonder how much it affects sleep.
I need a sustainable routine without drastic daily changes.
I am comparing cameras for landscape photography.
